def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate indicators
    df['ema_fast'] = ta.trend.EMAIndicator(df['close'], window=params['ema_fast']).ema_indicator()
    df['ema_slow'] = ta.trend.EMAIndicator(df['close'], window=params['ema_slow']).ema_indicator()
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']).rsi()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index, dtype='int')
    
    # Long condition: fast EMA crosses above slow EMA and RSI is below threshold
    long_condition = (df['ema_fast'] > df['ema_slow']) & (df['rsi'] < params['rsi_threshold'])
    signals.loc[long_condition] = 1
    
    # Short condition: fast EMA crosses below slow EMA and RSI is above threshold
    short_condition = (df['ema_fast'] < df['ema_slow']) & (df['rsi'] > (100 - params['rsi_threshold']))
    signals.loc[short_condition] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: USD/CHF exhibits momentum reversals when fast EMA crosses slow EMA, confirmed by RSI extremes, capturing overextended moves before reversal.
